flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 71% at Huertas College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (460 vs 1.6k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Huertas College rose 65% between 2017 and 2020 ($4.5k → $7.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Huertas College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.4k → $8.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Huertas College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.4k → $8.8k).
